creator: sbz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

A new version 1.2.3 was committed in ports. It should fix the setproctitle issue on FreeBSD. 

Upstream made a fix for this issue and it's included in 1.2.3:
- https://github.com/dvarrazzo/py-setproctitle/pull/99
- Commit https://github.com/dvarrazzo/py-setproctitle/commit/90dd69e4dcc7eaa9186a2b0661c4ac1942d2bd21
